request.support_safe_request_summary: Owner requested a website diagnostic review that may need hybrid help to complete safely.
request.desired_outcome_summary: Escalate the specialist route honestly if local-only coverage is insufficient while keeping bounded continuity markers.

route.route_reason: Local specialist required bounded hybrid help for the diagnostic review.

execution.disclosure_text: This website request used bounded hybrid help because the local specialist needed additional support for the diagnostic review.
execution.support_safe_status_summary: Website-specialist work escalated through a hybrid route and disclosed that choice explicitly.

harness.support_safe_outcome_summary: Cipher preserved activation-ready continuity markers while honestly disclosing a hybrid website-specialist escalation.

teaching.lesson_summary: Translates current-reference findings into bounded guidance about what feels stale, overdone, or appropriately current for the website.
teaching.design_choice_explanation: The recommendation explains which structural and pacing signals matter for the product instead of telling Cipher to imitate any outside source.
teaching.anti_slop_rationale: It uses current references to sharpen judgment while explicitly avoiding trend worship, mimicry, and generic startup-page sludge.
teaching.next_step_guidance: Keep the concept and hierarchy, then selectively update only the sections whose treatment reads stale.

research.disclosure_text: Bounded hybrid research support informed the freshness notes for this design pass.
research.signal_summary: Current-reference synthesis highlighted which visual cues still feel contemporary and which ones now read as overused.
research.provenance_summary: Signals were translated into implementation-facing guidance from bounded hybrid support rather than preserved as raw reference dumps.

support_safe_summary: Cipher can teach the design choices and disclose that bounded hybrid research informed freshness guidance without pretending a live browser session exists.
